ksa_text: Knowledge of data mesh principles and federated data ownership models, including the role of data product thinking, domain ownership boundaries, platform infrastructure, and self-service analytics within decentralized data architectures.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data monitoring tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of data monitoring tools and techniques
Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Quality falls outside the primary competency scope of the BI Director. This knowledge KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Data Quality truly out-of-scope for the BI Director? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Data Quality as a core or recommended competency for the BI Director. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Data Quality falls outside the established competency profile for the BI Director. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Data Quality is outside the competency scope of the BI Director. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
